CAPTION TEMPLATES

Saves caption text + font + size + colors + outline + bg opacity as a reusable preset.

FILL COLOR
OUTLINE
EXPORT PRESET
RESOLUTION
VIDEO FPS
FILENAME TEMPLATE
{date} {time} {timestamp} {counter} {random} {caption} {ext}
→ --
📱 IPHONE 17 PRO MAX

Injects iPhone 17 Pro Max EXIF + Apple MakerNote on images and exports as a real .HEIC on Mac (falls back to .JPG on Windows until the HEIC encoder ships). Apple QuickTime atoms on MP4 videos. Filename becomes IMG_XXXX.HEIC / IMG_XXXX.MOV.

📅 CAPTURE DATE

Sets the EXIF DateTimeOriginal / CreateDate. Leave blank (RANDOM) for today's date with a time within ±8h of now.

STRIP METADATA

Force-removes all metadata and disables HEIC conversion (output stays .JPG). Overrides iPhone metadata if both are on.

🔇 MUTE AUDIO

Exports video only — no audio track. Faster on slow hardware (skips audio decode + encode entirely).

⚙️ EXPORT ENGINE

Fast: frame-perfect, fastest. Hardware-accelerated. May hang on some Windows laptops.
Reliable: frame-perfect, slower (~2–3× real-time). Loads ~30MB FFmpeg on first use, then cached. Use this if Fast hangs.
Legacy: real-time capture. May drop frames on slow hardware. Use only if Fast and Reliable both fail.

— OR —
Size 100% View

DIMENSIONS▾

px
px
RATIO 1 : 1

CROP ALIGNMENT▾

Click an anchor or drag the crop box on the image directly to choose what stays in frame.

TEMPLATES▾

Save the current image's filters + adjustments + alignment as a reusable look.

FILTERS▾

UNLINKED click to link all

Click to add. Multiple stack. Each image has its own selection unless linked.

ADJUSTMENTS▾

LINKED click to unlink
100
100
100
0
0
0

OUTPUT▾

RESOLUTION

SRC = each image at its own crop pixel dims (mixed sizes possible). 1K=1080w, 2K=2160w, 4K=4320w. Width is anchored; height follows the chosen ratio.

FORMAT
QUALITY100
📱 IPHONE METADATA

Injects iPhone 17 Pro Max EXIF + Apple MakerNote on each image and exports as a real .HEIC on Mac (falls back to .JPG on Windows until the HEIC encoder ships). Each image gets a capture timestamp 1–4 minutes after the previous one for burst-style realism. Filename becomes IMG_XXXX.HEIC.

📅 CAPTURE DATE (1ST IMAGE)

Anchor timestamp for the first image. Subsequent images stagger 1–4 min after. Leave blank (RANDOM) for today's date with a time within ±8h of now.

📍 GPS LOCATIONnone
Custom coordinates
STRIP METADATA

Removes any source EXIF before iPhone injection (if iPhone is also ON, the result is fully clean → reinjected with iPhone EXIF). Independent of iPhone toggle.

METADATA INSPECTOR

Drop up to 3 files to compare their metadata side-by-side. Differing values are flagged in red. Works with JPG, PNG, HEIC, and TIFF for full EXIF; basic info shown for video and other formats.

VIEW
Showing every field across loaded files.
DROP A FILE ABOVE TO BEGIN
Choose Drive folder
